summary.zh: 识别后续确认、blocked、TODO、未完成交付等未闭环信号。
summary.en: Detects unresolved follow-up, blocked states, TODOs, and unfinished delivery signals.

when_to_use.zh: 当需要定位任务链路中是否存在未解决、待确认或被阻塞的尾巴时使用。
when_to_use.en: Use this to find unresolved, awaiting-confirmation, or blocked tails in a task flow.

limitations.zh: 正常的计划拆分也可能包含 TODO 语言，需要结合最终交付状态判断。
limitations.en: Normal planning can also contain TODO wording, so interpret it with the final delivery state.

privacy.zh: 只读取标准化 SessionEnvelope 的事件内容，不保存原始会话文本。
privacy.en: Reads only standardized SessionEnvelope events and does not store raw conversation text.
